roleDescription:
Senior Full-Stack Engineer — London (hybrid)

We need a hands-on senior engineer to own features across our Attio-integrated recruiting stack.
Must have 5+ years TypeScript, React, and API design experience.
Bonus: semantic search, embeddings, or CRM app development.
Strong communication for client-facing submittals and HM collaboration.
cvText:
Senior full-stack engineer with 8 years building TypeScript/React systems at scale.
Led migration of monolithic CRM extensions to event-driven microservices.
Strong experience with Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, and API design.
Previously built recruiting tooling integrating ATS workflows with custom scoring pipelines.
Education: BSc Computer Science, University of Manchester.
